column1: With the help of the Slave Woman, Mayzun, you found the Emir Ali hiding in his bedroom.  With your urging (and a few sharp remarks from Mayzun), the Emir swore he'd restore the city.  By the first light of dawn, the Emir Ali al-Din Hasan ordered all fighting to cease and proclaimed the evil rule of Ad Avis and Khaveen to be over.  As the Emir began an incredibly dull speech, you slipped away to complete your quest.
column2: With the help of the Slave Woman, Mayzun, you found the Emir Ali hiding in his bedroom.  With your urging (and a few sharp remarks from Mayzun), the Emir swore he'd restore the city.  By the first light of dawn, the Emir Ali al-Din Hasan ordered all fighting to cease and proclaimed the evil rule of Ad Avis and Khaveen to be over.  As the Emir began an incredibly dull speech, you slipped away to complete your quest.

column1: You stand beside the cracked and dry fountain in Raseir's Plaza of the Fountain.  You hold in your hands the waterskin containing the Water Elemental that you captured so long ago in Shapeir.
column2: You stand beside the cracked and dry fountain in Raseir's Plaza of the Fountain.  You hold in your hands the waterskin containing the Water Elemental that you captured so long ago in Shapeir.

column1: We are Shameen and Shema, keepers of the Katta's Tail Inn.  When the Katta were driven from Raseir, we journeyed to the Northland in search of a hero.
column2: We are Shameen and Shema, keepers of the Katta's Tail Inn.  When the Katta were driven from Raseir, we journeyed to the Northland in search of a hero.

column2: Through his courage and skills, he restored the Baron's son and daughter and banished the wicked Baba Yaga.

column1: He became Hero of Spielburg.
column2: He became Hero of Spielburg.

column1: He journeyed back with us to Shapeir.  Here he defeated the Elementals of Fire, Air, Earth, and Water to save our city.
column2: He journeyed back with us to Shapeir.  Here he defeated the Elementals of Fire, Air, Earth, and Water to save our city.

column2: He is a true hero.

column2: I am Walid, a guard of the Palace and a member of the Eternal Order of Fighters.

column2: This man vanquished me in a fair fight and demonstrated great skills in combat.

column1: When I lay helpless upon the ground, he was given orders by the members of EOF to kill me.
column2: When I lay helpless upon the ground, he was given orders by the members of EOF to kill me.

column1: Instead, he showed me mercy.  This man is a true hero.
column2: Instead, he showed me mercy.  This man is a true hero.

column2: Who will speak for this man of mercy?

column2: I am the Enchantress Aziza.

column2: This man of his own free will went into the desert and sought the plant-woman Julanar.

column1: Through his kindness and compassion, he allowed Julanar to forget the pain and suffering of her past and to again face life with joy.
column2: Through his kindness and compassion, he allowed Julanar to forget the pain and suffering of her past and to again face life with joy.

column2: This man also found a caged beast in the desert.

column2: At the risk to his own life, he helped me escape from the city.

column1: And so, as the moon moves slowly through the starry sky above the mountains and the desert of Shapeir, our Hero bids a fond "Adieu" to his latest set of adventures and miserable puns.  Where will the road lead next...?
column2: And so, as the moon moves slowly through the starry sky above the mountains and the desert of Shapeir, our Hero bids a fond "Adieu" to his latest set of adventures and miserable puns.  Where will the road lead next...?

column2: Shema greets you as you leave the room with some breakfast and supplies to take with you.  The inn is filled with katta merchants who wish you luck upon your departure.

column1: As you pass through the gate of Shapeir, the gate guard presents you with a new saurus, a gift from the Sultan.  Ahead in the desert sands awaits a mass of Saurii and riders being led by the Caravan Master, a huge Centaur who orders the Caravan into motion before the sun can be seen.
column2: As you pass through the gate of Shapeir, the gate guard presents you with a new saurus, a gift from the Sultan.  Ahead in the desert sands awaits a mass of Saurii and riders being led by the Caravan Master, a huge Centaur who orders the Caravan into motion before the sun can be seen.

column2: You ride out to join in this new adventure, pausing only to watch the sunrise.

column2: The only way of getting goods across the desert is by pack saurus.
